description: CompositionRed, black and white checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with triple top-stitching, a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and mid arm button tab, shaped yoked back, printed branding on left chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with cowboy style shaped yoke and checks will give you a dashing air. The mid arm tabs on the sleeves mean you can roll them up when the weather gets warmer, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for that perfect semi-formal look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
